title: sundesmos #4886
definition:
1) that which binds together, a band, bond
    1a) of ligaments by which the members of the human body
        are united together
 2) that which is bound together, a bundle
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) that which binds together, a band, bond
    1a) of ligaments by which the members of the human body
        are united together
 2) that which is bound together, a bundle

    NASB:  that which binds together, i.e. a bond:
